context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the property-based-testing instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define properties, not examples** — state what should always be true, not specific inputs/outputs

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Write property** — define an invariant using `check all` with appropriate generators

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run test** — `mix test test/my_test.exs`
